title: tephrosia cardiophylla
intro: Tephrosia cardiophylla, also known as the heart-leafed horsefly vine, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which contain alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Tephrosia cardiophylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia cardiophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
